title: cactus scheeri
intro: Cactus scheeri, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus or Queen of the Night, is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Selenicereus. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality due to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cactus scheeri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cactus scheeri, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality, and can be found in various health food stores and online retailers.
